records.question: Which tracks named Soldier Side - Intro composed by Dolmayan, John/Malakian, Daron/Odadjian, Shavo are MPEG audio files lasting at least 63764 milliseconds and priced at most 0.99?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN media_types ON tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id
WHERE tracks.milliseconds >= 63764 AND media_types.name = 'MPEG audio file' AND tracks.unit_price <= 0.99 AND tracks.composer = 'Dolmayan, John/Malakian, Daron/Odadjian, Shavo' AND tracks.name = 'Soldier Side - Intro'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT tracks.id
FROM tracks
JOIN media_types ON tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id
WHERE tracks.name = 'Soldier Side - Intro'
AND tracks.composer = 'Dolmayan, John/Malakian, Daron/Odadjian, Shavo'
AND media_types.name = 'MPEG audio'
AND tracks.milliseconds >= 63764
AND tracks.unit_price <= 0.99

records.question: Which tracks have the name exactly equal to 'Daughter', have the composer exactly equal to 'Dave Abbruzzese & Jeff Ament & Stone Gossard & Mike McCready & Eddie Vedder', and also have related genres and related playlist_tracks records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN genres ON tracks.genre_id = genres.id
JOIN playlist_tracks ON tracks.id = playlist_tracks.track_id
WHERE tracks.name = 'Daughter' AND tracks.composer = 'Dave Abbruzzese & Jeff Ament & Stone Gossard & Mike McCready & Eddie Vedder'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.id
FROM tracks t
WHERE t.name = 'Daughter'
  AND t.composer = 'Dave Abbruzzese & Jeff Ament & Stone Gossard & Mike McCready & Eddie Vedder'
  AND t.genre_id IS NOT NULL
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM playlist_tracks pt WHERE pt.track_id = t.id)

records.question: Which tracks are on the album titled Black Sabbath Vol. 4 (Remaster)?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN albums ON tracks.album_id = albums.id
JOIN artists ON albums.artist_id = artists.id
WHERE albums.title = 'Black Sabbath Vol. 4 (Remaster)'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT t.id
FROM tracks t
JOIN albums a ON t.album_id = a.id
WHERE a.title = 'Black Sabbath Vol. 4 (Remaster)'

records.question: Which tracks named Wave (Vou te Contar) composed by Antonio Carlos Jobim cost exactly 0.99, last at most 271647 milliseconds, have at least 9057557 bytes, and are in the MPEG audio file format?

records.question: Which tracks named Folhas Secas from the album Compositores by O Terço have a unit price of 0.99 and last at least 161253 milliseconds with a file size of at least 5284522 bytes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN albums ON tracks.album_id = albums.id
JOIN artists ON albums.artist_id = artists.id
WHERE tracks.name = 'Folhas Secas' AND tracks.milliseconds >= 161253 AND tracks.bytes >= 5284522 AND artists.name = 'O Terço' AND tracks.unit_price = 0.99 AND albums.title = 'Compositores'

records.question: Which tracks named Koyaanisqatsi composed by Philip Glass are Soundtracks, have a Protected AAC audio file format, last exactly 206005 milliseconds, cost 0.99, and have at least 3305164 bytes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN media_types ON tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id
JOIN genres ON tracks.genre_id = genres.id
WHERE media_types.name = 'Protected AAC audio file' AND tracks.milliseconds = 206005 AND tracks.composer = 'Philip Glass' AND genres.name = 'Soundtrack' AND tracks.bytes >= 3305164 AND tracks.unit_price = 0.99 AND tracks.name = 'Koyaanisqatsi'

records.question: Which tracks composed by Willie Dixon are priced at most 0.99?

WHERE tracks.unit_price <= 0.99 AND tracks.composer = 'Willie Dixon'

FROM tracks

records.question: Which tracks named True Believers, composed by Billy Duffy/Ian Astbury, have a length of exactly 308009 milliseconds, a size of exactly 9981359 bytes, and a unit price of at least 0.99?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN media_types ON tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id
JOIN invoice_lines ON tracks.id = invoice_lines.track_id
WHERE tracks.milliseconds = 308009 AND tracks.composer = 'Billy Duffy/Ian Astbury' AND tracks.name = 'True Believers' AND tracks.bytes = 9981359 AND invoice_lines.unit_price >= 0.99

FROM tracks
WHERE tracks.name = 'True Believers'
  AND tracks.composer = 'Billy Duffy/Ian Astbury'
  AND tracks.milliseconds = 308009
  AND tracks.bytes = 9981359
  AND tracks.unit_price >= 0.99
